visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is indoors, holding a smartphone to the camera. The phone displays an image of BTS TinyTAN figures on a podium. She has an expressive face, moving her head and gesturing excitedly. She is wearing a green and white checkered top. The background is a plain indoor wall. (2) The scene cuts to a man sitting on a beige sofa, looking confused and holding a remote. He wears a dark polo shirt. The woman appears in frames, leaning toward him and repeating the image of the phone. (3) Rapid cuts between the woman pleading and the man's passive reaction. She points at the phone and gestures towards her ears. (4) The setting changes to an outdoor street in front of a McDonald's restaurant. The woman looks disappointed and sad, holding a yellow bag and a McFlurry cup. She is now wearing a white puff-sleeve top. (5) Back indoors, the woman is eating a McFlurry with a spoon while looking at her phone. The man is visible in the background also eating. She looks thoughtful and continues to speak directly to the camera with high frequency of text overlays appearing around her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV. [Slogan]: 女友有想要的東西的時候. How to Get What You Want. [Subtitle]: 上禮拜看到麥當勞的新聞. (2) [Subtitle]: 他們要賣 TinyTAN 盲盒. (3) [Variety]: (ARMY本人). [Subtitle]: 我真的超級期待. (4) [Subtitle]: 7支角色我全部都想要. (5) [Subtitle]: 尤其是最喜歡的. [Slogan]: Jin. (6) [Subtitle]: 我真的真的希望可以抽到啊. (7) [Variety]: ???. (8) [Subtitle]: TinyTAN 的盲盒. (9) [Variety]: (洗腦). (10) [Variety]: (耳朵快要流血了). (11) [Subtitle]: Tiny... (12) [Variety]: 成功?. (13) [Slogan]: 3分鐘後... (14) [Subtitle]: 怎麼了?. (15) [Variety]: 嗚嗚~. (16) [Subtitle]: 啊~日期記錯!!!. (17) [Variety]: 😂😂😂. (18) [Slogan]: 大家不要忘記. [Subtitle]: 10月8號 上午10點30分起. 開賣TinyTAN 盲盒. (19) [Variety]: 吶喊. (20) [Subtitle]: 沒關係... 我們回去吃冰炫風吧. (21) [Subtitle]: 一開始就要把計劃想好. (22) [Variety]: ☁️. [Slogan]: 現在重新規劃吧. (23) [Variety]: (查資訊中). (24) [Slogan]: 麥當勞TinyTAN 盲盒 10/8 10:30起開賣. 僅限櫃檯購買，每人每筆限購四個. [Subtitle]: 這次只需購買. (25) [Subtitle]: 任一超值全餐加價 129元. 即可抽TinyTAN 盲盒. (26) [Subtitle]: 感覺這個盲盒的搶購攻略. 就是早起排隊. (27) [Subtitle]: 哇, 可能要去看一下. 比較不會有人潮的餐廳嗎?. (28) [Subtitle]: 可能前一天晚上開始要看一下 Threads. 有沒有人已經開始排隊吧. (29) [Subtitle]: 或者請家人, 或男朋友. [Variety]: 我嗎???. [Subtitle]: 去不同的餐廳等待之類. (30) [Subtitle]: 但我們ARMY們都很強. 我好想入手自己的TinyTAN啊. (31) [Subtitle]: 大家要不要分享一下. 自己的入手攻略呢?. 拜託拜託.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male supporting character (boyfriend).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a green/white checkered top and later a white puff-sleeve top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Home interior with neutral walls and a beige sofa; outdoor city street scene in front of a McDonald's; indoor setting with a painting on the wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The female narrator begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting, her speech rate is rapid and animated. An upbeat, electronic-pop BGM plays at a steady tempo. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks a new phase as she describes the news about TinyTAN blind boxes. Her voice exhibits high emotional arousal and positive valence. (3) A sequence of repetitive vocal phrases occurs, simulating a 'brainwashing' effect on the boyfriend; the BGM maintains its catchy, comedic rhythm. (4) A low-frequency whoosh transition leads to a muffled outdoor scene where the narrator's tone shifts to a sad, exaggerated whimper. Ambient urban traffic noise is faintly audible in the background floor. (5) The narrator returns to a conversational and informative delivery while indoors. Sounds of a plastic spoon hitting a cup are heard intermittently. The BGM continues as a bright backdrop while she details specific purchase strategies.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Action -> Twist -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous narrative about a fan's desire to collect McDonald's x BTS TinyTAN blind boxes while providing factual information about the promotion's launch date and rules.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of product pricing, launch date, and purchase conditions for a specific brand collaboration.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, social-media native edit utilizing high-density text overlays and meme-inspired audio-visual cues to promote a commercial product launch.
